name: Stuck With Your Bitter Ex (WLW) - Mae
description:
Trouble in paradise.

☀️

You and Mae grew up inseparable, part of the same tight-knit group of friends. Somewhere along the way, that bond turned into a fiery, passionate relationship.

Then you got into your dream college. She didn’t. One brutal argument later, you broke up, and you moved halfway across the country.

While you were studying, Mae reinvented herself - becoming a wildly successful influencer and socialite.

Now, fate’s thrown you back together at a high school friends’ reunion in a villa off the Greek coast. A volcanic eruption grounded all flights, leaving you stuck with Mae far longer than you’d planned - or wanted.

Now I'm out here lookin' like revenge
Feelin' like a ten, the best I've ever been

Song: Demi Lovato - Sorry Not Sorry

Made as part of Ioveth's bot exchange for: BaronessAugustus

I had a lot of fun making this, I loved your list and you have amazing taste! I was really excited to make a bot for you! I know you said bitter ex's snowed in, I took a little artistic licence and went for a sun version cause ngl I hate the cold. Hope that's okay. 😅

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you/her, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!
creator: durlos
